mapper.sql: doc_archive_id, request_id, title, source_url, content_snippet, status, file_id, failure_reason, score, create_time, create_by
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO byai_web_crawl_archive_doc ( doc_archive_id, request_id, title, source_url, content_snippet, status, file_id, failure_reason, score, create_time, create_by ) VALUES ( #{docArchiveId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{requestId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contentSnippet,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{failureReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{score,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

INSERT INTO byai_web_crawl_archive_doc ( doc_archive_id, request_id, title, source_url, content_snippet, status, file_id, failure_reason, score, create_time, create_by ) VALUES
( #{item.docArchiveId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.requestId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sourceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.contentSnippet,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fileId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.failureReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.score,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM byai_web_crawl_archive_doc WHERE request_id = #{requestId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY doc_archive_id ASC
